resources.string: Notification access not granted — tap to fix
A home screen that asks what you came here to do, instead of showing you what you didn\'t.
When you tap "Unlock full phone", we\'ll return you to this launcher.
Focus turns on Do Not Disturb when you open it, so notifications can\'t pull you out of what you came here to do.
Set Focus as your home screen
Pressing home should bring you here. We\'ll ask Android for the home role next.
Pick the apps that should appear on your focus screen. Aim for 4–8.
Lock and unlock your phone, or press home, to start using Focus.
